## Description

<!-- A clear and concise description of what the pull request does. Include any relevant motivation and background. -->

## Types of changes

<!-- Put an `x` in the boxes that apply. -->

- [ ] Bug Fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New Feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Content Update
- [ ] Guest Post / Topic Contribution
- [ ] Documentation Update
- [ ] Maintenance / Refactor
- [ ] Other

## Checklist

<!-- Please follow this checklist and put an x in each of the boxes, like this: [x]. You can also fill these out after creating the PR. This is simply a reminder of what we are going to look for before merging your code. -->

- [ ] I have read the Contributing Guide
- [ ] I have added the necessary documentation (if appropriate)
- [ ] Content changes were discussed in an issue first when they add or
      substantially rewrite a post
- [ ] I have cited sources for factual claims, data, images, code, or reused
      ideas where needed
- [ ] I have disclosed conflicts of interest for guest content, sponsored work,
      or product/vendor mentions
- [ ] I have run `pnpm lint`, `pnpm format:check`, and `pnpm build`
- [ ] I have manually checked affected pages with `pnpm preview` when relevant
- [ ] I have included screenshots for visible UI changes (if needed)
- [ ] This PR includes a breaking change

## Further comments

<!-- If this is a relatively large or complex change, kick off the discussion by explaining why you chose the solution you did and what alternatives you considered, etc... -->
